subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Feb 1st, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 1st, 2026

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Black Ember Outpost is a great, black fortress built directly into the wall of a massive cavern in the Underdark.
source_quote: a great, black fortress has been built into the wall of the cave

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The outpost is constructed of polished, worked obsidian stone.
source_quote: polished obsidian of Black Ember Outpost was built directly into the cave wall

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The only true entrance to the outpost is a set of obsidian double doors.
source_quote: A set of obsidian double doors appear to be the only true entrance into Black Ember Outpost

subject: Great Hall
fact: The Great Hall is a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long inside the outpost.
source_quote: a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: A Fire Giant sergeant is drilling troops in the Great Hall.
source_quote: A Fire Giant sergeant attempting to drill his ogre troops

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: The Fire Giant sergeant is frustrated with his troops.
source_quote: The Fire Giant is frustrated

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur proposed using mage hand to remove the ogres' uniforms.
source_quote: Felkur proposes using mage hand to remove the ogres clothes

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur proposed using a recording of female hell hounds to distract the male hell hounds.
source_quote: Felkur proposes to use a recording of female hell hounds to distract the male hell hounds

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur cast mage hand to attempt to remove the ogres' clothes.
source_quote: Felkur casts mage hand, and attempts to remove the ogres clothes

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur rolled a natural 20 on sleight of hand, causing the ogres not to notice the magical hand.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural 20 sleight of hand and the Ogres don't notice the disembodied magical hand

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur rolled an 18 on sleight of hand, causing one ogre's uniform to fall off.
source_quote: Felkur then rolls an 18, and the uniform of one of the ogres falls off

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is located in a huge cavern at the end of an endless Underdark tunnel.
source_quote: The endless Underdark tunnel finally opens up into a huge cavern.

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The cavern floor is smoother than usual and free of stalagmites and other natural formations.
source_quote: The floor is much smoother in this cave than what you're used to, free of stalagmites and other natural formations

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: A few stalactites cling to the ceiling several hundred feet above the cavern floor.

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: A great, black fortress has been built into the wall of the cave in the southeastern corner.

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Natural fungal illumination shines on the polished, worked stone of the structure.

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Firelight is visible dancing through wide arrow slits in the fortress.
source_quote: Through wide arrow slits you see firelight dancing

fact: The sound of raucous laughter and shouting echoes in the cave.
